blocks.title: Tools Pathways
blocks.description: Software directory, CRM tools, affiliate tools, funding calculators, Notion templates, automation templates, and future Chrome extensions.

items.title: Software Directory
items.description: Curated software for operators, partners, brokers, creators, and business owners.

items.title: CRM Tools
items.description: CRM and pipeline tools for lead management, partner tracking, and deal follow-up.

items.title: Affiliate Tools
items.description: Affiliate platforms, link management, tracking tools, and partner-enablement resources.

items.title: Funding Calculators
items.description: Calculators for funding scenarios, repayment estimates, acquisition capital, and partner economics.

items.title: Notion Templates
items.description: Operating templates for deal flow, partner tracking, funding intake, content, and SOPs.

items.title: Automation Templates
items.description: Reusable automations for Make, Zapier, n8n, Airtable, Sheets, and CRM workflows.

items.title: Chrome Extensions
items.description: Future browser tools for research, deal capture, affiliate workflows, and productivity.
